events.title: Brian May turns 79
events.blurb: The legendary Queen guitarist and astrophysicist Brian May celebrates his 79th birthday.

angles.name: Brian May Birthday Angle
angles.copy: Happy 79th birthday to the iconic Brian May! What's your favourite Queen guitar solo – the one that still gives you chills?

events.title: Mick Jagger turns 83
events.blurb: The Rolling Stones frontman, Mick Jagger, celebrates his 83rd birthday.

angles.name: Mick Jagger Birthday Angle
angles.copy: 83 years young and still rocking! Happy birthday to the legendary Mick Jagger. What's your go-to Stones anthem?

events.title: MTV launched 45 years ago
events.blurb: Music Television, MTV, launched on this day in 1981, famously kicking off with The Buggles' "Video Killed The Radio Star."

angles.name: MTV Launch Anniversary Angle
angles.copy: 45 years since MTV burst onto our screens, changing music forever. The first video? The ironically titled 'Video Killed The Radio Star' by The Buggles. Did it, though?

events.title: Oasis released 'Definitely Maybe'
events.blurb: Oasis' groundbreaking debut album, 'Definitely Maybe', was released on this day in 1994, propelling them to superstardom.

angles.name: Definitely Maybe Anniversary Angle
angles.copy: Remember 1994? Oasis dropped their debut album 'Definitely Maybe' and Britpop was never the same. What's your favourite track from the album?

events.title: Woodstock Festival began 57 years ago
events.blurb: The iconic Woodstock Music & Art Fair, a pivotal moment in music history, kicked off on this day in 1969.

angles.name: Woodstock Anniversary Angle
angles.copy: 57 years since half a million people descended on a field in New York for three days of peace, love, and music. What's your favourite Woodstock performance?

events.title: Remembering Elvis Presley, would have been 91
events.blurb: Today marks the anniversary of the passing of the King of Rock and Roll, Elvis Presley, who would have been 91.

angles.name: Elvis Death Anniversary Angle
angles.copy: 49 years since we lost the King. Elvis Presley's legacy lives on. What's your favourite Elvis track?

events.title: Remembering Tupac Shakur, would have been 55
events.blurb: Today marks 30 years since the passing of influential rapper Tupac Shakur, who would have been 55.

angles.name: Tupac Death Anniversary Angle
angles.copy: 30 years ago, we lost a hip-hop icon. Remembering Tupac Shakur today, whose powerful lyrics still resonate.

events.title: Remembering Jimi Hendrix, would have been 84
events.blurb: Today marks the anniversary of the death of guitar legend Jimi Hendrix, who would have been 84.

angles.name: Jimi Hendrix Death Anniversary Angle
angles.copy: 56 years since the world lost a true guitar visionary. Remembering the unparalleled talent of Jimi Hendrix today.

events.title: The Beatles released 'Abbey Road'
events.blurb: The Beatles' iconic album 'Abbey Road', featuring its legendary zebra crossing cover, was released on this day in 1969.

angles.name: Abbey Road Anniversary Angle
angles.copy: 57 years ago, The Beatles gave us 'Abbey Road'. That album cover is still one of the most famous in history, isn't it?

events.title: Chrissie Hynde turns 75
events.blurb: The influential lead singer of The Pretenders, Chrissie Hynde, celebrates her 75th birthday.

angles.name: Chrissie Hynde Birthday Angle
angles.copy: Happy 75th birthday to the incredible Chrissie Hynde! Her voice and attitude with The Pretenders are truly iconic.

events.title: Liam Gallagher turns 54
events.blurb: The distinctive voice of Oasis and rock 'n' roll icon, Liam Gallagher, celebrates his 54th birthday.

angles.name: Liam Gallagher Birthday Angle
angles.copy: Our Kid turns 54! Happy birthday to the one and only Liam Gallagher. What's your favourite Oasis track he sang?

events.title: John Lennon's 'Imagine' released 55 years ago
events.blurb: John Lennon's timeless anthem for peace, 'Imagine', was released as a single on this day in 1971.

angles.name: Imagine Release Anniversary Angle
angles.copy: 55 years since John Lennon asked us to 'Imagine'. A song that still inspires hope and reflection today.

events.title: Apple unveiled the first iPod 25 years ago
events.blurb: Apple introduced the revolutionary first-generation iPod on this day in 2001, changing how we listen to music forever.

angles.name: iPod Anniversary Angle
angles.copy: 25 years since Apple unveiled the original iPod. Remember carrying 1,000 songs in your pocket for the first time? A game changer!

events.title: Happy James Bond Day!
events.blurb: Today is James Bond Day, marking the anniversary of the premiere of the first 007 film, 'Dr. No', in 1962.

angles.name: James Bond Day Angle
angles.copy: Shaken, not stirred... it's James Bond Day! Which Bond actor is your favourite, and what's the ultimate Bond theme song?

events.title: Remembering John Lennon, would have been 86
events.blurb: Today would have been the 86th birthday of The Beatles' co-founder, John Lennon, a global icon of peace and music.

angles.name: John Lennon Birthday Angle
angles.copy: On what would have been his 86th birthday, we remember the enduring legacy of John Lennon. His music and message continue to inspire.

events.title: John Cleese turns 87
events.blurb: The legendary comedian and actor, best known for Monty Python and Fawlty Towers, John Cleese, celebrates his 87th birthday.

angles.name: John Cleese Birthday Angle
angles.copy: Sending big birthday wishes to the brilliant John Cleese, turning 87 today! What's your favourite John Cleese moment, from Python to Fawlty Towers?

events.title: The Beatles released 'The White Album'
events.blurb: The Beatles' ambitious double album, commonly known as 'The White Album', was released on this day in 1968.

angles.name: White Album Anniversary Angle
angles.copy: 58 years ago, The Beatles delivered their sprawling, diverse masterpiece, 'The White Album'. Which track is your unexpected favourite?
